title: Metro Mondego
description: metromondego.pt zoominfo.com/c/metro-mondego-sa/430685182 public transport company responsible for sustainable mobility in the Coimbra, Miranda do Corvo, and Lousã region of Portugal. Originally conceived as a light rail network, the project has been restructured into a fully electric, high-capacity Bus Rapid Transit system known as Metrobus. The network spans 42 kilometers with 42 dedicated stations and 35 electric buses, designed to provide efficient, eco-friendly, and integrated urban transportation for an estimated 13 million passengers annually
